summary: Fighter subsystem matching slice split from PR #2617. It touched nine src/melee/ft files, producing 6 new matches and 11 unmatched-item improvements in the decomp-dev report, including full matches for ftmaterial data, ftCo_800D730C, ftCo_80093BC0, ftCo_800978D4, ftMaterial_800BF260, and ftMaterial_800BF534.

key_files.role: Cleaned fighter common matching code by replacing a temporary pointer to fp->co_attrs.grav with direct field access, reusing ftCo_800AD54C_inline0 for a repeated CPU-command sequence, using ftCo_800A1AB4 for distance, and replacing an M2C_FIELD access with Fighter_804D64FC->x20[fp->kind].
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftCo_800AF290 and ftCo_800A9CB4 improvements

key_files.role: Adjusted declaration/order and data access in ftCo_800D730C, used ftCo_804D9018 for vel.z, changed link catch attrs type, and passed fp->fv.lk.xC directly to it_802A2B10 in fn_800D8EC8.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftCo_800D730C as 100% and fn_800D8EC8 improved to 99.99%

key_files.role: Expanded rotation-matrix handling in ftCo_DamageIce_Init with HSD_JObjGetRotation, quaternion flag checks, HSD_MkRotationMtx/HSD_MtxQuat, and PSMTXTranspose.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftCo_DamageIce_Init improvement

key_files.role: Inlined the top joint argument into efAsync_Spawn in ftCo_800978D4, contributing to a reported full match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftCo_800978D4 as 100%

key_files.role: Adjusted PAD_STACK sizing/placement and changed gobj->user_data access to GET_FIGHTER in ftCo_80093BC0, contributing to a reported full match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftCo_80093BC0 as 100% and ftCo_80092908 improved

key_files.role: Introduced a local pointer to fp->co_attrs.xBC and PAD_STACK in inlineB0, improving ftKb_SpecialNYs_8010AC78 according to the bot report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftKb_SpecialNYs_8010AC78 improvement

key_files.role: Introduced an inner block and fp2 alias before ftCommon_8007D5D4 in ftPp_SpecialS_0_Coll_inline3 for matching improvement.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftPp_SpecialS_0_Coll improvement

key_files.role: Changed pl_8003E17C argument order, local declaration order, and a float zero comparison form in ftColl_80077C60.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftColl_80077C60 improvement

key_files.role: Added static HSD_TevDesc and HSD_TECnst data near ftMObj, yielding reported 100% .data and full matches for ftMaterial_800BF260 and ftMaterial_800BF534.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftmaterial .data as 100% and ftMaterial_800BF260/ftMaterial_800BF534 as 100%

what_changed: The PR was scoped to src/melee/ft and split from PR #2617 by directory/subsystem for reviewability.
The diff made targeted fighter-source matching changes across ftCommon, ftKirby, ftNana, ftcoll, and ftmaterial.
The decomp-dev bot reported +1280 matched-code bytes, +336 matched-data bytes, 6 new matches, and 11 improvements in unmatched items for this slice.
Several changes replaced generated-looking or less-typed access patterns with helper calls or typed fields, such as ftCo_800A1AB4 and Fighter_804D64FC->x20[fp->kind].
Several changes were codegen-shaping edits involving declaration order, local aliases, PAD_STACK, and small expression rewrites.
ftmaterial.c added static material/TEV data that the report ties to 100% ftmaterial .data.

smart_moves.text: Using the existing ftCo_800AD54C_inline0 helper replaced a repeated literal sequence of ftCo_800B46B8/ftCo_800B463C CPU-command calls in ftCo_800AB224.
Replacing manual dx/dy/sqrt distance code with ftCo_800A1AB4 reduced duplicated distance logic in ftCo_800AF290.
Replacing M2C_FIELD(Fighter_804D64FC, float**, 0x20)[fp->kind] with Fighter_804D64FC->x20[fp->kind] improved typed access in ftCo_800AF78C_inline0.
The author kept the PR path-scoped to src/melee/ft and documented that per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the split slice.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching fighter code, check for existing local helpers before preserving repeated generated-looking call sequences or hand-expanded math.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftCo_800AB224 repeated CPU command calls replaced by ftCo_800AD54C_inline0
raw_diff: ftCo_800AF290 manual distance calculation replaced by ftCo_800A1AB4

decomp_lessons.lesson: Typed fighter globals and nested fields can be preferable to M2C_FIELD/raw offset access when the structure member is known.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftCo_800AF78C_inline0 changes M2C_FIELD(Fighter_804D64FC, float**, 0x20)[fp->kind] to Fighter_804D64FC->x20[fp->kind]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Declaration order, temporary aliases, direct field-vs-pointer access, and PAD_STACK sizing can affect MWCC matching, but this PR only supports them as narrow matching tactics tied to bot-reported improvements.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftkirbyyoshiegg.c xBCp alias and PAD_STACK(16)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data additions can be part of a matching slice when the decomp report directly ties them to .data closure, but their ownership should remain evidence-bound to the touched translation unit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftMaterial_803C69D0 and ftMaterial_803C6A44 static additions
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists main/melee/ft/ftmaterial .data as 100.00%

naming_conventions.name: ftCo_LinkCatchAttrs
naming_conventions.text: fn_800D8EC8 changed attrs from struct ftLk_DatAttrs* to ftCo_LinkCatchAttrs*, indicating a more specific local type name for the common Link catch attributes in this context.

naming_conventions.name: xBCp
naming_conventions.text: ftkirbyyoshiegg inlineB0 used xBCp as a short pointer alias for fp->co_attrs.xBC.

naming_conventions.name: fp2
naming_conventions.text: ftNn_Init introduced fp2 as an inner-block alias of fp before calling ftCommon_8007D5D4; evidence supports this as a matching tactic, not a semantic naming standard.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace duplicated command-call sequence with an existing inline helper.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftCo_800AB224 uses ftCo_800AD54C_inline0(fp) instead of multiple ftCo_800B46B8 calls followed by ftCo_800B463C.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a known helper for repeated distance computation.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftCo_800AF290 uses ftCo_800A1AB4(fp, target) instead of local dx/dy/sqrtf__Ff math.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use typed structure fields instead of M2C_FIELD where a field is known.
Adjust local declaration order and initialization timing to match codegen.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftCo_800D730C moves fp and x2d0 initialization after declarations and introduces extern f32 ftCo_804D9018 for vel.z.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftCo_800D730C as 100%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use narrow stack padding edits only with report evidence.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftCo_Guard.c changes PAD_STACK values/placement, and ftkirbyyoshiegg.c adds PAD_STACK(16); the bot report shows related improvements but the PR does not include objdiff detail explaining each padding choice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: For JObj rotation matrix matching, expanding helper logic into explicit HSD_JObjGetRotation, quaternion flag branching, matrix construction, and transpose may improve local match.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftCo_DamageIce_Init replaced JObjRotMtx calls with explicit rotation/quaternion matrix handling for yrotn and xrotn.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftCo_DamageIce_Init improvement

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev reported 6 new matches and 11 improvements, with matched code increasing by 1280 bytes and matched data increasing by 336 bytes for GALE01.
review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]

review_feedback.text: No review comments or reviews are present in the loaded PR slice.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, changed-file counts
human_pr_text: scope, split rationale, preliminary report, local checks
notes: The slice includes strong file/diff evidence and a bot report with specific new matches and improvements.

The PR body includes preliminary full-branch metrics from the unsplit source branch, but it explicitly says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for this draft; this postmortem therefore treats the decomp-dev issue comment as the slice-specific report.
No human review comments are loaded, so no reviewer intent or requested changes can be inferred.

The bot report provides match/improvement outcomes but not detailed objdiff listings for each local tactic, so PAD_STACK, aliasing, and declaration-order edits are recorded as narrow tactics rather than accepted style rules.
ftmaterial data additions are supported by the bot report as matching data progress, but the loaded PR evidence does not include independent section-ownership analysis beyond the diff and report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer existing fighter helpers over duplicated generated-looking sequences when matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2620, ftCo_800AB224 replaced a repeated CPU-command sequence with ftCo_800AD54C_inline0, and ftCo_800AF290 replaced manual distance math with ftCo_800A1AB4. For fighter matching, search local helpers before keeping duplicated call/math blocks.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use known typed fighter fields instead of M2C_FIELD
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2620 replaced M2C_FIELD(Fighter_804D64FC, float**, 0x20)[fp->kind] with Fighter_804D64FC->x20[fp->kind] in ftCo_800AF78C_inline0. This is a concrete example of converting a recovered raw field access to the typed field form.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2620 fighter slice changed nine src/melee/ft files
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2620 was scoped to src/melee/ft and changed ftCommon files, ftkirbyyoshiegg.c, ftNn_Init.c, ftcoll.c, and ftmaterial.c as a fighter matching slice split from PR #2617.
source_update_candidates.reason: May help future path-scoped lookup for fighter matching history.

source_update_candidates.title: ftmaterial static TEV data names added in PR #2620
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2620 added static HSD_TevDesc ftMaterial_803C69D0 and static HSD_TECnst ftMaterial_803C6A44 in src/melee/ft/ftmaterial.c; the bot report tied ftmaterial .data to 100%. Curator should verify section ownership before recording as data-sheet fact.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists ftmaterial .data as 100%
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential data ownership/path fact, but needs curator verification against symbols/sections.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the fp2 alias in ftNn_Init.c or xBCp alias in ftkirbyyoshiegg.c into a naming standard; evidence only shows local matching tactics.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale because no human review comments or reviews are loaded.
Do not promote PAD_STACK edits as ordinary style; the evidence supports them only as narrow matching tactics with bot-reported outcomes.
Do not treat the unsplit source branch preliminary metrics as this PR slice's final score; the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative.
